caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact St Maarten Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing moderate easterly winds up to 23 kt with seas building to 5.5 ft and an 8-second dominant swell period from the east. Rain probability remains high at 76% with conditions favoring wet weather and choppy marine conditions, while Ocho Rios reports lighter winds near 12 kt and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate northerly winds up to 19 knots with waves reaching 4.4 feet and a swell period of 5 seconds. Rain probability is 45%, indicating a significant chance of showers, while Istanbul sees lighter winds at 14 knots and less than 10% rain probability.
